title: Thai Linguine Stir Fry
description: A vegan twist on a classic Asian-inspired pasta dish, featuring linguine, spicy sauce, and juicy vegetables.
instructions: Cook linguine according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté for 3-4 minutes.
Add the bell peppers and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Add the Thai chilies and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegan protein and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the vegan peanut sauce and cook for 1 minute.
Combine cooked linguine and sauce mixture.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
